name: Glosel Co., Ltd.
summary: Glosel Co., Ltd. operates as a semiconductor technological trading company in Japan. It sells integrated circuits, semiconductor devices, display devices, and other electric parts and instruments. The company also offers storage products, printed wiring boards, sensors, communication devices, and optic products. In addition, it develops semiconductor strain sensors under the STREAL brand; and develops and designs electric instruments. Further, it provides design and development, and contracted services, including custom LSI development, embedded software development, and EMS. The company was formerly known as RENESAS EASTON Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Glosel Co., Ltd. in July 2019. Glosel Co., Ltd. was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
